name: lindo-ai
description: Create websites, pages, and blog posts with AI. Manage clients and credits.
long_description: Lindo AI is a website builder platform for agencies. This extension lets you create websites, pages, and blog posts using AI directly from Claude. You can also manage clients, assign websites, generate magic login links, and allocate credits — all without leaving the conversation.

tools.name: create_website
tools.description: Create a new website using AI

tools.name: create_page
tools.description: Create a new page on a website using AI

tools.name: create_blog
tools.description: Create an AI-generated blog post on a website

tools.name: publish_blog
tools.description: Publish a static markdown blog post

tools.name: list_websites
tools.description: List all websites in the workspace

tools.name: assign_website
tools.description: Assign a website to a client

api_key.title: Lindo API Key
api_key.description: Your Lindo AI API key. Get it from your workspace settings at app.lindo.ai
